item.title: Archive Code 02
item.description: This repo contains material that I used in univ projects and stuff that I learn along the way. You can use this repo’s to help with your own studies or anything else. Please post issues if something’s not right or wrong. Feel free to suggest something that you want to be posted here. Thank you! Project Tree What it is Language Android Android-studio related Projects Java Artificial Intelligence AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning Python Dotfiles Configs and Linux related stuff Mixed Networking Cyber Security, OSINT, and anything else in between Mixed + Shell RMarkdown Template, note-taking, and stuff related to documents R

item.title: Archive Code 01
item.description: This repo contains material that I used in univ projects and stuff that I learn along the way. You can use this repo’s to help with your own studies or anything else. Please post issues if something’s not right or wrong. Feel free to suggest something that you want to be posted here. Thank you! Project Tree What it is Language Android Android-studio related Projects Java Artificial Intelligence AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning Python Dotfiles Configs and Linux related stuff Mixed Networking Cyber Security, OSINT, and anything else in between Mixed + Shell RMarkdown Template, note-taking, and stuff related to documents R
